title: I'm Sam Vermeir
description: a 22-year old senior game development student Digital Arts & Entertainment at Howest in Kortrijk (Belgium).

My best potential is when I can work in small/medium teams. I think teamwork is an essential part of the game-making process. A game can be carried to a whole other level when working in a well-oiled, communicative and versatile team.
I can work on the whole game pipeline but my main focus is gameplay programming with an interest in AI development.
